document: Policy Circular No. 11.99 dated 17.07.2026 — Section VII Evaluation/Scoring Criteria

criteria.description: Experience in use of technology for road inspection
Qualifications and competence of the key staff for the assignment

technical_evaluation_criteria.responsiveness_threshold: Technical proposal must score at least 75/100 to be responsive for financial evaluation (Independent Engineer / BOT-HAM variant). Authority Engineer / EPC variant states 70/100.
evaluation_process_notes: Detailed evaluation criteria to be used for technical bids is at Appendix-EC.
Bidder must carry out self-evaluation based on Appendix-EC and reference the documents relied upon.
Detailed/complete technical evaluation of a bidder shall be made available to that bidder only, with 7 days to respond to any objection on their evaluation.
Based on experience, consulting industry capacity and project-specific requirements, the Agency may modify the above criteria for selection of IE.

items.description: Average Annual Turnover (last 3 years) from consultancy business of civil engineering projects
items.scoring: < 3% of TPC = 0 marks; 3% of TPC = 3.0 marks; add 0.50 marks for every 1% of TPC above 3% of TPC, subject to maximum 2.0 additional marks.

items.description: Nos. of Highway Professionals with the Firm
items.definition: Professionals possessing degree in Civil Engineering/Transport Planning/Transport Economics/Traffic Management/Geology/Environment Science or Engineering with 8 years experience in highway/bridge/tunnel and employment in the firm for more than one year. Current Employment Certificate (not more than 15 days old) to be uploaded on INFRACON; Form 26AS/TCS/TDS certificate also to be provided.

items.description: Experience as Independent Engineer/Authority Engineer/Construction Supervision/PMC in number of Highway Projects of length equal to project length, similar category (2/4/6**-laning or more) in last 7 years
items.scoring: 1 project = 3 marks; add 0.5 mark extra for completed assignment subject to maximum 4 marks.

items.description: Experience in DPR preparation for number of Highway Projects (of length 40% of project length of similar category, 2/4/6**-laning or more) in last 7 years
items.scoring: 2 projects = 2 marks; add 0.5 mark extra for each additional project subject to maximum 1 mark.

items.description: Experience in Construction Supervision as AE/IE/PMC of Major structures having length more than 500 meter in last 7 years
items.scoring: 2 projects = 1.0 mark; add 0.5 mark extra for each additional project subject to maximum 2.0 marks.

items.description: Experience in preparation of DPR of Major structures having length more than 500 meter in last 7 years
items.scoring: 2 projects = 1.0 mark; add 0.5 mark extra for each additional project subject to maximum 1.0 mark.

items.description: Additional requirement in case of specialized projects***

notes: Note 1: In case of JV, turnover and experience details of Lead and JV partners to be added.
Note 2: Employer's certificate/certificate from Statutory Auditor to be submitted substantiating experience/turnover claimed.
Note 3: ** For 4/6 laning projects, experience of 2 lane considered with multiplication factor 0.4, but only for 2 lane projects whose consultancy cost was more than Rs.3.0 crore.
*** If project includes specialized work (tunnels, specialized structures) in substantial quantum, requirement/marks may be included by suitably adjusting marks of other attributes.

* Consultants must give details of firm experience for completed and on-going highway assignments, separately for PPP and non-PPP projects, with client experience certificates. Completed works list may include assignments substantially (90% of contract value) completed. No qualification/experience considered without proof.
Experience of AE/IE providing consultancy services to a private organization shall NOT be considered relevant for the current assignment.

** Similar projects means 2/4/6 lane as applicable. For 2-lane projects, 4/6 lane experience counted with multiplication factor 1.5. 4/6 lane considered interchangeably for 4/6 laning. For 4/6 laning projects, 2 lane experience counted with factor 0.4, but only for 2 lane projects whose consultancy cost was more than Rs.3.0 crore.
*** If project includes specialized work (tunnels, specialized structures) in substantial quantum, this requirement/marks may be included by suitably adjusting marks of other attributes.
In case of JV, turnover and experience details of Lead and JV, plus Employer's certificate, should be submitted substantiating experience claimed.

firm_rating.jv_weighted_average_formula: Weighted Average Rating = S1 x R1 + S2 x R2

jv_weighted_average_variables.S1: Share of Lead Partner in JV
jv_weighted_average_variables.S2: Share of Other Partner in JV

notes: Rating of the firm published by NHAI shall be considered; calculated for both JV members and weighted average used for JV.

For projects with tentative project value <= 500 Cr, for new entrants as part of JV (JV members with no historical rating), the rating of only the other partner shall be considered as the weighted average rating.
Rating of non-substantial partner of JV will not be considered for evaluation.

items.description: Ownership of Network Survey Vehicle (NSV) technology for pavement inspection

Ownership of Mobile Quality Control Unit having Soil Testing, Asphalt Testing, Concrete testing, Aggregate Testing and pavement testing equipment onboard along with sufficient IT and communication systems
Ownership of NABL Accredited Lab by the firm
Ownership of Mobile Bridge Inspection Unit (MBIU) or better technology for bridge inspection
Ownership of Falling Weight Deflectometer (FWD) or better technology for pavement strength measurement

notes: The IE/Consultant owning the equipment shall submit proof of ownership.

Experience of the JV firms in use of technology shall also be counted. Experience of firm or JV firm in NSV/FWD/MBIU/Retro-reflectometer (or equivalent) shall be supported by experience certificate. Experience for a private concessionaire/contractor to be certified by the Govt Department. False certification attracts penal provisions.

normal_highway_project.staff_position: Team Leader cum Senior Highway Engineer

standalone_bridge_project.staff_position: Team Leader cum Senior Bridge Engineer

standalone_tunnel_project.staff_position: Team Leader cum Senior Tunnel Expert

key_personnel_detailed_scoring.position: Team Leader cum Senior Highway Engineer

sub_components.description: Full Time Post-Graduation in Construction Management/Transportation/Highway Engineering
sub_components.scoring: PG from IIT/NIT/IISc/BITS or other State Government Engineering College of repute or Engineering College of Developed Countries = 14 marks (full); other colleges = 7 marks (50%).

sub_components.description: Essential Software Experience (MS Projects, Prima Vera)
sub_components.scoring: 1 or more = 2; <1 = 0

sub_components.description: Total Professional Experience in handling Highway projects
sub_components.scoring: Minimum 12 years = 4 marks; additional 1 mark for every additional year subject to maximum 8 marks.

sub_components.description: Experience as Team Leader or similar capacity in Highway Development Projects (2/4/6 laning** and above), 40% of project length subject to minimum 25 Kms
sub_components.scoring: Minimum 5 years = 8 marks; additional 4 marks per additional year subject to maximum additional 8 marks.

sub_components.description: Experience as Team Leader or similar capacity in EPC project (AE) / BOT Toll or BOT Annuity or HAM (IE) (40% of project length, min 25 Kms)
sub_components.scoring: 1 project = 4 marks; add 4 marks for each additional project subject to maximum 12 additional marks. Must work on project at least 24 months or construction period (whichever lower).

sub_components.description: Experience as Team Leader or similar capacity in project Preparation including design of major highway Project (40% of project length, 2/4/6 laning** and above)
sub_components.scoring: <2 projects = 0; 2 projects = 1; add 1 mark for each additional project subject to maximum 3 additional marks. Must work for complete period of DPR/Design project.

sub_components.description: Experience as Team Leader or similar capacity in Highway Development projects (40% of project length, min 25 Kms, 2/4/6 laning** and above)
sub_components.scoring: 1 project = 4 marks; add 4 marks for similar completed assignment subject to maximum additional 16 marks. Must work at least 24 months or construction period. Excludes experience supervised as IE in any PPP project.

sub_components.description: Experience as Team Leader or similar capacity in international projects of comparable size, complexity and technical specialty (40% of project length, min 25 Kms)
sub_components.scoring: 1 project = 4 marks; add 2 marks for similar completed assignment subject to maximum additional 4 marks. Developed-country weighting applies (100%/75%/50%).

sub_components.description: Contribution to any IRC/IS Code/Manual as part of a drafting committee or publication of paper in a reputed international journal in last 10 years
sub_components.scoring: One Code/Manual/Paper = 2; More than one = 4

components.name: Employment with the firm
components.scoring: <1 year = 0; 1 year = 0.4 marks; add 0.4 marks for each subsequent year subject to maximum 1.6 additional marks.

components.name: Age limit
components.scoring: >=55 years on date of submission = 0; >=50 but <55 years = 1; <50 years = 2

position_notes: Similar Capacity: (i) On behalf of Consultant - Team Leader/Resident Engineer (Construction Supervision/IE/AE/DPR); (ii) On behalf of concessionaire/Contractor - Project Manager (Construction/Construction Supervision); (iii) In Government Organizations - Superintending Engineer (or equivalent) and above.
Only projects where personnel input is not <9 months considered for S.No.2(b).
Only projects where personnel input is not <12 months considered for S.No.2(c) and 2(d).

Experience on behalf of AE/IE or Contractor/Concessionaire to be duly endorsed by respective Government agency; else INFRACON-uploaded experience considered. Key personnel/bidder solely responsible for any fake information/CV (may result in debarment).

sub_components.description: Full Time Post-Graduation in Construction Management/Transportation/Highway Engineering
sub_components.scoring: PG from IIT/NIT/IISc/BITS or other State Government Engineering College of repute or Developed Countries = 12 (full); other colleges = 6 (50%).

sub_components.description: Total Professional Experience in handling Highway projects

sub_components.scoring: 1 project = 7 marks; add 3 marks for similar completed assignment subject to maximum of 14 additional marks. Must work at least 24 months or construction period. Excludes experience supervised as IE in any PPP project.

sub_components.description: Experience as Resident cum Highway Engineer or similar capacity in EPC project (AE) / BOT Toll or BOT Annuity or HAM (IE) (40% of project length, min 25 Kms, 2/4/6 laning** and above)
sub_components.scoring: 1 project = 3 marks; add 3 marks for similar completed assignment subject to maximum of 11 additional marks. Must work at least 24 months or construction period.

sub_components.scoring: 1 project = 7 marks; add 3.5 marks for similar completed assignment subject to maximum 7 marks. Developed-country weighting applies (100%/75%/50%).

components.name: Employment with the Firm
components.scoring: <1 year = 0; 1 year = 2 marks; add 1 mark for each subsequent year subject to maximum 2 additional marks.

position_notes: Similar Capacity: (i) Consultant - Resident/Highway Engineer; (ii) Concessionaire/Contractor - Resident Engineer/Highway Engineer/Project Manager (Construction/Supervision); (iii) Government - Executive Engineer (or equivalent) and above.
Only projects where personnel input is not <12 months considered.
Experience on behalf of AE/IE or Contractor/Concessionaire to be endorsed by Government agency; else INFRACON-uploaded experience considered.

sub_components.description: Experience in similar capacity in design of Rehabilitation and repair of Major Bridges/ROB/Flyover/Interchanges/other structures

Only projects where personnel input is not <6 months considered.
For S.No.2(iv) black-spot experience, rectified blackspot IDs may be provided on INFRACON.

general_notes_for_all_key_positions: AICTE (Major/Core Branch of Engineering/Technology and their relevant/appropriate course leading to degree in Engineering/Technology), 2017 shall be considered for equivalence of disciplines.
For gaps not addressed in the above notification, the same shall be decided by a committee of the Authority with at least one educationalist as a committee member.
Self-Certified Undertakings on INFRACON, if not supplemented with Client-Issued Certificates, shall not be considered for Evaluation.
Retired Govt. Officers shall upload the promotion orders to equivalent/similar capacity posts on INFRACON.

If a key personnel has worked in the next lower category to the similar capacity, the marks allotted in the category 'experience in similar capacity' shall be reduced to two-thirds. Applicable for evaluation of all key personnel.

Similar projects means 2/4/6 lane as applicable for the project for which RFP is invited. For 2-lane projects, experience of 4/6 lane also considered with multiplication factor 1.5; 4/6 lane considered interchangeably for 4/6 laning projects; for 4/6 laning projects, experience of 2 lane considered with multiplication factor 0.4.
Essential Software Experience (MS Roads/Projects, Prima Vera or other relevant software) - only certificate from any Govt training institute/Educational institute will be considered.
CV submitted without Medical certificate of fitness as per Appendix-B shall not be evaluated and will be assigned zero (0) marks.

Developed-country project experience weighting (where applicable): 1. Developed Countries decided per latest UN notification.; 2. 100% marks for project in developed countries.; 3. 75% marks for multilateral funded projects (World Bank, ADB, JICA, EIB, any UN agency).; 4. 50% marks for any other projects in developing countries (other than India).

technical_capacity_residual_bid_capacity.title: Requirements with respect to Technical Capacity - Provision for maximum number of consultancy services to be awarded to one consultant
technical_capacity_residual_bid_capacity.rule: Residual AE/IE Bid Capacity 'R' shall be more than the tentative length of the Project.

variables.CL: Completed Length = Length of AE/IE completed NHs/Expressways in last 5 Financial Years.
variables.TF: Turnover Factor = multiplication factor based on Average Annual Turnover (see table).
variables.RP: Running Projects = Length of AE/IE projects in hand where provisional/completion certificate not issued; includes projects where firm is H-1 bidder but LOA not issued.

notes: R to be calculated for each JV member and weighted average as per share in JV considered.
Applicants shall submit requisite details for determination of technical capacity in the prescribed format (Technical Capacity - Form T-11).
